heading: Farm Credit Bank capitalization
label: 2014 Farm Credit Bank capitalization
text: In accordance with , the Farm Credit Banks shall provide, through bylaws and subject to Farm Credit Administration regulations, for the capitalization of the bank and the manner in which bank stock shall be issued, held, transferred, and retired and bank earnings distributed.section 2154a of this title
